clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation within the limbic and salience networks, reflecting the broad functional domain of processing emotional valence, arousal, and mood state.

Anchored in cortico-striatal and ventromedial prefrontal reward circuitry, this cluster represents the high-level functional axis of assigning subjective worth to stimuli to guide motivated goal-directed behavior.

Mapping consistently onto the transmodal default mode network, these terms represent the internally directed, abstract generation of self-referential narratives and the social conceptualization of other agents.
